title: Jönköping Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Jönköping, with a Z-Score of -3.49. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current weather conditions in Jönköping are characterized by a significant drop in temperature, with a high Z-Score indicating a rare and extreme event. 
 The HDD value of 13.2 GG and CDD value of 0.0 GG suggest a high demand for heating and no need for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 55%, with moderate winds of 11.5 km/h, contributing to the harsh conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
